content.content:
1	<script setup lang="ts">
2	import { ref, onMounted, computed } from 'vue'
3	import { useSnippetStore } from '@/stores/snippet'
4	import CodeEditor from '@/components/common/CodeEditor.vue'
5	import CodeBlock from '@/components/common/CodeBlock.vue'
6	import type { CodeSnippet } from '@/types'
7	import {
8	  Search,
9	  Plus,
10	  Edit,
11	  Delete,
12	  Download,
13	  Upload,
14	} from '@element-plus/icons-vue'
15	import { ElMessageBox } from 'element-plus'
16	
17	const snippetStore = useSnippetStore()
18	
19	const showDialog = ref(false)
20	const dialogMode = ref<'create' | 'edit'>('create')
21	const editingSnippet = ref<Partial<CodeSnippet>>({
22	  title: '',
23	  code: '',
24	  language: 'javascript',
25	  description: '',
26	  tags: [],
27	})
28	const tagInput = ref('')
29	const fileInputRef = ref<HTMLInputElement | null>(null)
30	
31	const languages = [
32	  'javascript', 'typescript', 'python', 'java', 'go', 'rust',
33	  'c', 'cpp', 'csharp', 'php', 'ruby', 'swift', 'kotlin',
34	  'sql', 'html', 'css', 'scss', 'shell', 'yaml', 'json',
35	  'markdown', 'xml', 'plaintext',
36	]
37	
38	onMounted(() => {
39	  snippetStore.loadSnippets()
40	})
41	
42	function handleSearch() {
43	  snippetStore.filters.page = 1
44	  snippetStore.loadSnippets()
45	}
46	
47	function handlePageChange(page: number) {
48	  snippetStore.filters.page = page
49	  snippetStore.loadSnippets()
50	}
51	
52	function openCreateDialog() {
53	  dialogMode.value = 'create'
54	  editingSnippet.value = {
55	    title: '',
56	    code: '',
57	    language: 'javascript',
58	    description: '',
59	    tags: [],
60	  }
61	  showDialog.value = true
62	}
63	
64	function openEditDialog(snippet: CodeSnippet) {
65	  dialogMode.value = 'edit'
66	  editingSnippet.value = { ...snippet, tags: [...snippet.tags] }
67	  showDialog.value = true
68	}
69	
70	async function handleSave() {
71	  if (!editingSnippet.value.title?.trim() || !editingSnippet.value.code?.trim()) return
72	
73	  if (dialogMode.value === 'create') {
74	    await snippetStore.createSnippet(editingSnippet.value)
75	  } else {
76	    await snippetStore.updateSnippet(editingSnippet.value.id!, editingSnippet.value)
77	  }
78	  showDialog.value = false
79	}
80	
81	async function handleDelete(snippet: CodeSnippet) {
82	  try {
83	    await ElMessageBox.confirm(`确定删除代码片段"${snippet.title}"吗？`, '提示', {
84	      confirmButtonText: '确定',
85	      cancelButtonText: '取消',
86	      type: 'warning',
87	    })
88	    await snippetStore.deleteSnippet(snippet.id)
89	  } catch {
90	    // Cancelled
91	  }
92	}
93	
94	function addTag() {
95	  const tag = tagInput.value.trim()
96	  if (tag && !editingSnippet.value.tags?.includes(tag)) {
97	    if (!editingSnippet.value.tags) {
98	      editingSnippet.value.tags = []
99	    }
100	    editingSnippet.value.tags.push(tag)
